We couldn’t wait to get there and it was better than expected.  We are from New England and the chowder here was some of the best we’ve ever had!!
Definitely worth the hype. The chowder was the best I’ve had in the PNW, and my lobster roll was legit. Great staff, and although the line was long, it moved quickly.
I ordered the 4 cup sampler and everything was exceptional.  I can genuinely see what the crowds and the fuss is about.  Highly addictive.
